items.titolo: Phoebe Bridgers Ditched the Internet to Hype Up Her New Music. It’s Working
items.descrizione: The indie artist has played a string of surprise, small-venue shows with no phones allowed, prompting fans to piece together clues about a potential upcoming album.

items.titolo: Il prequel di The Crown si farà: Netflix avvia la produzione
items.descrizione: Netflix avvia la produzione del prequel di The Crown con un budget di 500 milioni di sterline.

items.titolo: Meta Silently Added Face-Recognition Code for Its Smart Glasses to Millions of Phones
items.descrizione: Code reviewed by WIRED uncovered an unreleased face-recognition system embedded in Meta’s smart glasses platform. It’s designed to identify people via biometric data stored on users’ phones.
